name: Roll or Fall
description: Roll diagonally and test your timing in Roll or Fall! Control your dice as it moves across tricky platforms filled with dangerous obstacles like lava, freezing blocks, and hollow tiles that can send you falling. Tap at the right moment to change direction, stay on track, and keep moving forward. Collect coins along the way to unlock new dice characters, each adding a fresh look to your run. With fast-paced gameplay, simple controls, and challenging hazards, every move counts. One mistake and it’s over how far can you roll before you fall?
instructions: How to Play Tap to move right Tap again to switch direction left right Stay on the platform Avoid traps and gaps Collect coins to unlock new dice
